message:
test(wave-39): add 12 pure data-type tests for error + distributed/snapshot

Cover Copy/Hash traits for ErrorKind, Recoverability, RecoveryAction,
ErrorCategory, BackoffHint; Debug/Clone/Copy for RecvError, Cancelled.
Cover Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq for TaskState, SnapshotError; Debug/Clone for
TaskSnapshot, BudgetSnapshot, RegionSnapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
